title: mairania uva-ursi
intro: Mairania uva-ursi, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to North America. It possesses medicinal properties due to the presence of arbutin, a compound that has been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections and other health issues. The health benefits of mairania uva-ursi include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Mairania uva-ursi can be consumed as a herbal preparation in the form of tea, tincture, or capsules, although its effectiveness and safety should be discussed with a healthcare professional before use.
